text:
Havent been able to get tests to work, might be because enum34 is only available for py27 and this port requires py3+

(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #8)
> Review items:
> 
> - Needs USE_PYTHON=concurrent (installs setup.py:console_scripts)
> - Add TEST_DEPENDS and test target
> - Re-add updated dependencies (missing)
